    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nimport base64\nimport json\nfrom datetime import UTC, datetime\nfrom typing import Any, cast\nfrom uuid import uuid4\n\n\ndef utc_now() -> datetime:\n    return datetime.now(tz=REDACTED new_job_id() -> str:\n    return str(uuid4())\n\n\ndef encode_cursor(payload: dict[str, Any]) -> str:\n    raw = json.dumps(payload, separators=REDACTED\",\", \":\"), sort_keys=REDACTED\"utf-8\")\n    return base64.urlsafe_b64encode(raw).decode(\"ascii\")\n\n\ndef decode_cursor(cursor: str | None) -> dict[str, Any] | None:\n    if cursor is None:\n        return None\n    raw = base64.urlsafe_b64decode(cursor.encode(\"ascii\"))\n    return cast(dict[str, Any], json.loads(raw.decode(\"utf-8\")))\n\n\ndef json_dumps(value: Any) -> str:\n    return json.dumps(value, default=REDACTED, sort_keys=True, separators=REDACTED\",\", \":\"))\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "REDACTED",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom pathlib import Path\n\nfrom pydantic_settings import BaseSettings, SettingsConfigDict\n\n\nclass Settings(BaseSettings):\n    model_config = SettingsConfigDict(env_file=REDACTED\".env\", env_prefix=REDACTED\"MINIQ_\", extra=REDACTED\"ignore\")\n\n    service_name: str = \"miniq\"\n    api_host: str = \"0.0.0.0\"\n    api_port: int = 8000\n    worker_metrics_port: int = 9101\n    scheduler_metrics_port: int = 9102\n    redis_url: str = \"redis://redis:6379/0\"\n    redis_group: str = \"workers\"\n    default_queue: str = \"default\"\n    worker_queues: str = \"default\"\n    worker_concurrency: int = 4\n    worker_poll_block_ms: int = 1000\n    worker_visibility_timeout_ms: int = 10_000\n    worker_reclaim_interval_seconds: float = 2.0\n    scheduler_interval_seconds: float = 1.0\n    scheduler_config_path: Path = Path(\"config/schedules.yaml\")\n    db_path: Path = Path(\"/data/miniq.db\")\n    log_level: str = \"INFO\"\n    retry_base_delay_seconds: float = 1.0\n    retry_multiplier: float = 2.0\n    retry_cap_seconds: float = 30.0\n    retry_jitter_ratio: float = 0.2\n    health_timeout_seconds: float = 2.0\n    http_timeout_seconds: float = 5.0\n    api_base_url: str = \"http://localhost:8000\"\n    scheduler_batch_size: int = 128\n    broker_read_count: int = 8\n\n    @property\n    def database_url(self) -> str:\n        return f\"sqlite+aiosqlite:///{self.db_path.as_posix()}\"\n\n    @property\n    def queue_names(self) -> list[str]:\n        items = [item.strip() for item in self.worker_queues.split(\",\")]\n        return [item for item in items if item]\n\n\ndef get_settings() -> Settings:\n    return Settings()\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "REDACTED",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {

        },

        },

        }
      ],

    }
  ]
}
